name: Backlog Review
description: Weekly summary of backlog state — pending items, blockers, and next priorities.

name: Backlog Groomer
description: Annotator agent — estimates, flags one-way doors, and challenges usefulness of pending items. Read-only on the repo; append-only on the backlog.

name: Backlog Builder
description: Worker agent — claims ONE human-approved item, builds it on a branch, opens a PR (never merges). Disabled by default; gate kept manual.
